name: Collection O Darussalam Near Universitas Syiah Kuala Formerly Meurah Mulia

reviews.originalComment: Harganya terjangkau, kamarnya bersih, lokasinya strategis, dan pelayanannya juga baik dan ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The price is affordable, the rooms are clean, the location is strategic, and the service is good and friendly.

reviews.originalComment: Hotel nya bersih,nyaman,dan harga nya terjangkau.pelayanan resepsionis nya juga ramah dan baik.pkok nya nyaman banget utk nginap bersama keluarga😎kalian wajib cobainnn utk nginap bersama kluarga dan pasangan..
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and the prices are affordable. The reception service is also friendly and good. It's really comfortable for staying with family. You should definitely try it for staying with family and partners. 😎

reviews.reviewTitle: Recommendations for staying in Banda Aceh.
reviews.originalTitle: Rekomendasi untuk menginap di banda aceh
reviews.originalComment:
Kemana-mana gampang, 
Dekat penginapan ada warung nasi dan ada toko kenlontong, 
Jadi mau beli apa aja serba mudah, 
Pelayanan bg ikram nya luar biasa
reviews.reviewComments:
It's easy to go anywhere, 
Near the accommodation there is a rice shop and a convenience store, 
So buying anything is very easy, 
The service from Ikram is outstanding.

reviews.originalComment: Ini adalah sambungan dari bookingan kamar 4 malam sebelumnya. saya menginap disini saya merasakan pengalaman yang sangat baik. Staff ramah, kamar sebanding dengan harga.. yang paling saya suka adalah staff nya perduli dengan keamanan kendaraan pribadi saya, kemudian untuk springbed nya benar benar kualitas bagus.. saya hampir tidak percaya hal itu, dan yang sangat menyenangkan nya adalah AC nya dingin! Itu yang saya butuhkan di cuaca Banda Aceh yang sedang panas ini. Saya sangat puas dan akan kembali lagi nanti tentu nya!
reviews.reviewComments: This is a continuation of my previous 4-night room booking. I had a very good experience staying here. The staff is friendly, and the room is comparable to the price. What I liked most is that the staff cares about the security of my personal vehicle. Also, the spring bed is really of good quality. I can hardly believe it, and what is very pleasant is that the air conditioning is cool! That's what I needed in this hot weather in Banda Aceh. I am very satisfied and will definitely return later!

reviews.originalComment: Kamar mandi yang disukai tamu biasanya bersih, luas, memiliki shower air panas, dan menyediakan perlengkapan mandi lengkap
reviews.reviewComments: Bathrooms that guests prefer are usually clean, spacious, have a hot water shower, and provide complete toiletries.

reviews.originalComment: Harganya terjangkau, kamarnya bersih, lokasinya strategis, dan pelayanannya juga baik dan ramah
reviews.reviewComments: The price is affordable, the rooms are clean, the location is strategic, and the service is good and friendly.

reviews.reviewComments: The hotel is clean, comfortable, and the prices are affordable. The reception service is also friendly and good. It's really comfortable for staying with family. You should definitely try it for staying with family and partners. 😎

reviews.originalComment: Kamar mandi yang disukai tamu biasanya bersih, luas, memiliki shower air panas, dan menyediakan perlengkapan mandi lengkap
reviews.reviewComments: Bathrooms that guests prefer are usually clean, spacious, have a hot water shower, and provide complete toiletries.

reviews.originalComment: Saya adalah salah satu orang yang sering menginap di hotel dan jujur saya punya selera untuk setiap hotel yang pernah saya tempati. Untuk hotel bintang satu, seharusnya tidak banyak yang harus di ulas ataupun di komplain. Namun selama 5 malam saya menginap disini saya merasakan pengalaman yang sangat baik. Staff ramah, kamar sebanding dengan harga.. yang paling saya suka adalah staff nya perduli dengan keamanan kendara milik saya, kemudian untuk springbed nya benar benar kualitas bagus.. saya hampir tidak percaya hal itu, dan yang sangat menyenangkan nya adalah AC nya dingin! Itu yang saya butuhkan di cuaca Banda Aceh yang sedang panas ini. Kedepannya saya berharap hotel ini dapat menjaga sekaligus meningkatkan kualitas nya baik dari segi fasilitas ataupun pelayanan staff nya yang sudah sangat baik. Saran dan masukan sedikit kalau boleh... Kalau bisa ada petunjuk kiblat dan sejadah didalam kamar. Ohya, showernya mungkin sudah bisa diganti, karena shower di kamar saya tempati Itu nyaris tidak berfungsi, sehingga saya harus mandi, Wudu' dan BAK menggunakan air yang sama didalam ember. namun itu tidak jadi masalah sebenarnya. Itu saja... Terimakasih, saya pasti akan kembali.
reviews.reviewComments: I am someone who often stays in hotels and honestly, I have a taste for every hotel I have ever stayed in. For a one-star hotel, there shouldn't be much to review or complain about. However, during my 5-night stay here, I had a very good experience. The staff is friendly, the room is in line with the price... what I liked the most is that the staff cares about the security of my vehicle, and the spring bed is really good quality.. I could hardly believe it, and what is really pleasant is that the air conditioning is cold! That’s what I need in the hot weather of Banda Aceh. Moving forward, I hope this hotel can maintain and improve its quality in terms of facilities and the already very good staff service. A small suggestion, if I may... If possible, there could be a Qibla direction sign and a prayer mat in the room. Oh, and the shower could perhaps be replaced, because the shower in my room barely worked, so I had to bathe, perform ablution, and urinate using the same water in a bucket. But that wasn't really a problem. That's all... Thank you, I will definitely come back.

reviews.originalComment: Nyaman, bersih, privasi, Fasilitas best, pelayanan istimewa, tv, ac, shower, handuk,
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable, clean, privacy, best facilities, exceptional service, TV, air conditioning, shower, towels.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar nyaman. Tv,AC,shower berfungsi dengan baik. Kamar mandi nya juga bersih. kayanya bakal jadi hotel langganan buat nginap kalo lewat Banda lagi
reviews.reviewComments: Comfortable room. TV, air conditioning, and shower work well. The bathroom is also clean. It seems like it will become a regular hotel to stay at if passing through Banda again.

reviews.originalComment: Ada hargaaa tentunya ada kamarr, bagus, bersih, wangii, airnya kencang. Air sih yg paling penting . Tv nyala, ac dingin, tempat tidur nyamann. Mantapp
reviews.reviewComments: There are prices, of course, there are rooms, nice, clean, fragrant, with strong water. Water is the most important. The TV works, the air conditioning is cold, the bed is comfortable. Great!

reviews.originalComment: Harga yang tertera di aplikasi sesuai. Kamar bersih, untuk aktivitas yang dominan ke darussalam, sangat- sangat direkomendasikan untuk menjadikan tempat ini untuk beristirahat.
reviews.reviewComments: The price listed in the app is accurate. The room is clean, and for activities primarily in Darussalam, this place is highly recommended for resting.

reviews.originalComment: Tempat Penginapan nyaman dan dengan harga yg murah, walaupun agak kedalam  namun tidak jauh dengan kampus UIN karna kami ke banda dalam rangka wisuda .. pokonya mantap.
reviews.reviewComments: A comfortable and affordable accommodation, although a bit deep inside, but not far from the UIN campus because we are in Banda for the graduation.. definitely great.

Sangat direkomendasikan untuk solo traveler yang ingin beristirahat sejenak di sekitar Kota Banda Aceh atau Aceh Besar, hotel budget yang bersih, staff ramah dan kamar nyaman untuk istirahat, terima kasih

reviews.originalComment: Secara keseluruhan oke, hanya saja kalau bisa kamar mandi nya jangan pakai shower aja ada bak penampung air mandinya juga.
reviews.reviewComments: Overall it's fine, but if possible, the bathroom should not only have a shower but also a bathtub for bathing.
harga okay,cuma bilik betul2 sempit dan toilet agak berbau. Takde iron dan tak dibenarkan bawa iron so kena pergi iron di laundry. Tapi kawasan strategik,dekat dgn kedai

Hotel ni hotel murah. Jangan mengharap lebih. Cukup la ada tempat tidur berehat dan mandi. Yang dapat saya puji adalah tv yang berfungsi banyak channel dan lokasi dikelilingi dobi, kedai makan yang murah dan sedap.

reviews.originalComment: Kamar hotel sangat sesuai dengan harga per kamarnya. Cuma disayangkan tidak adanya genset ketika lagi pemadaman PLN sehingga kami tinggal dalam gelap selama 2 malam
reviews.reviewComments: The hotel room is very suitable for the price per room. It's just a pity there was no generator during the PLN power outage, so we stayed in the dark for 2 nights.
Tidak menginap karena fasilitas mati lampu dan saya merasa di rugikan uang saya tidak bisa kembali

reviews.originalComment: Fasilitas banyak yang tidak ada, seperti TV tidak ada padahal di deskripsi dibilang ada TV, kemudian sabun mandi tidak disediakan, kamarnya lembab dan agak kotor
reviews.reviewComments: Many facilities are lacking, such as there is no TV even though the description stated there was a TV, then soap is not provided, the room is damp and somewhat dirty.

A 5km du centre ville dans un quartier universitaire. Street food ,loubdry, warung alimentation en face de l hotel. J ai reservé via agoda .la chambre etait prete a mon arrivee.
Deja repondu. Bon rapporr qualitr prix personnel sympa

reviews.reviewTitle: Jangan pernah menginap disini atau anda akan rugi
reviews.reviewComments: Sangat terjelek selama sejarah saya menginap, CS nya sangat tak profesional ingin menjebak terus dengan rencana menghabiskan uang deposit yg saya beri, jangan ada yg ingin menginap di hotel tersebut
